name: Searing Blade
description:
This +2 greater striking longsword has an ornate brass hilt and a blade shaped like stylized flames. When wielded, the blade projects illumination resembling shimmering firelight, emitting dim light in a 10-foot radius.

Activate—Shoot Fire 2 (concentrate, manipulate)

Effect You cast the cantrip from the sword as a 7th-rank arcane spell, using your melee attack modifier with searing blade as your spell attack modifier.
